title: Quaal
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Quaal''' was one of the seven seasons of [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

It was also used as a first name for [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrians]] born during this season, such as [[Quaal Tavier Catharius]] and [[Quaal Stavi Giniras]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
*<!-- 1998-06-XX -->''[[Alien Encounters]]''
